name: Massachusetts Speech-Language Pathologist License
description: Already licensed as a speech-language pathologist? Here's whether your license transfers to Massachusetts - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

provider.name: Board of Registration of Speech-Language Pathology and Audiology

address.description: Board of Speech-Language Pathology and Audiology, 250 Washington Street, Boston, MA 02108

requiredDocuments.name: Background check (CORI)
requiredDocuments.description: Massachusetts Criminal Offender Record Information check.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

mainEntity.name: How much does a Massachusetts SLP license cost?
Is Massachusetts part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Massachusetts has not enacted ASLP-IC legislation as of 2026.

mainEntity.name: Does Massachusetts allow telepractice for SLPs?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, with a valid Massachusetts license.

mainEntity.name: Does Massachusetts have reciprocity for speech-language pathologists?

acceptedAnswer.text: No interstate compact currently covers speech-language pathologist practice in Massachusetts. To work in Massachusetts, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my speech-language pathologist license to Massachusetts?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 8 weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Massachusetts while my endorsement application is processing?

acceptedAnswer.text: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.
